channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Billboard Hot 100 Top 10 Countdown For May 2nd 2026 | Billboard News
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: Welcome to the Billboard Hot 100 update. I'm your host, Tetris Kelly. Let's dive into this week's top 10, dated May 2.
[Short music transition]
Host: We've got some changes in the top 10. "Folded" drops to number 10, and "Golden" falls to number 9. Coachella's impact is still felt, with "Daisies" returning to the chart at number 8. "So Easy" slips to number 7, and "Ordinary" takes the number 6 spot. "Be Her" is at number 5, and "Man, I Need" holds strong at number 4.
[Short music transition]
Host: Bruno Mars remains steady at number 3. But the big news is at the top. Ella Langley's "Choosin' Texas" has been dethroned, and Olivia Rodrigo takes the number 1 spot with her new song "Drop Dead". This is Rodrigo's fourth number 1 hit.
[Outro music plays]
Host: That's it for this week's update. If you want to stay up-to-date on all the latest Billboard news, be sure to subscribe and hit the notification bell. Thanks for tuning in!
